title: Conformity report of IPBES assessments with the data and knowledge management policy; Values Assessment and Sustainable Assessment
author: Gudde, Renske
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Conformity report of IPBES assessments with the data and knowledge management policy; case of 1) Methodological assessment regarding the diverse conceptualization of multiple values of nature and its benefits, including biodiversity and ecosystem functions and services, and 2) Thematic assessment of the sustainable use of wild species of the Intergovernmental Science-Policy Platform on Biodiversity and Ecosystem Services  

 To ensure that the IPBES assessments are delivered in agreement with the IPBES data and knowledge management policy ( https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.3551078 ), the delivery protocol for assessment drafts ( https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.5509137 ) was created. 
An objective scorecard was designed to determine how well this protocol is followed. The Values and Sustainable Use assessments were then scored following this scorecard. This report provides valuable insights into how well the IPBES data and knowledge management policy is currently implemented in IPBES products, and it highlights areas where the delivery protocol for assessment drafts could be improved.
